data.title: Hyperliquid’s 50x leveraged ETH long order has a floating profit of over $8 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Hypurrscan data shows that the 50x leveraged whales on Hyperliquid are still continuing to increase their ETH positions, with current positions reaching 175,100 ETH (approximately US$342 million), an average opening price of US$1,908, a liquidation price of US$1,882, and a floating profit of approximately US$8.05 million.

data.title: Spanish Banks Explore Cryptocurrency Services Amid Regulatory Changes
data.description:
According to PANews, Spanish banking giants CaixaBank, Kutxabank, and Renta 4 are planning to enter the cryptocurrency sector, following in the footsteps of BBVA. This move comes after the European Union's MiCA regulations took effect late last year, which have opened opportunities for traditional banks to offer cryptocurrency custody and sales services. However, other major Spanish banks such as Bankinter, Sabadell, Unicaja, and MyInvestor have stated they are not developing crypto-related services at this time. Meanwhile, Santander Bank and its subsidiary Openbank have declined to comment on their cryptocurrency plans.

Spokespersons for CaixaBank and Kutxabank have indicated that they are still formulating plans to offer cryptocurrency trading services. They confirmed that neither bank has yet submitted an application to the CNMV, Spain's securities market regulator. Kutxabank expressed its intention to provide customers with options for cryptocurrency custody, purchase, and sale, and confirmed that it is in the process of handling its CNMV application. CaixaBank, noted as Spain's third-largest bank, is also involved in these developments.

data.title: Hyperliquid’s 50x leverage whales have all closed their positions
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to monitoring by on-chain analyst Ai Yi, the 50x leveraged whale on Hyperliquid withdrew most of the principal and profits to compress the liquidation price. The remaining 160,234.18 ETH long positions were "actively liquidated", totaling 306 million US dollars. Currently, 8 million USDC have been withdrawn to Arbitrum.

data.title: Nigerian government seeks balance between cryptocurrency innovation and regulation
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Nigerian Information Minister Mohammed Idris said that the government is working to find a balance between promoting cryptocurrency innovation and strengthening regulation to build a more secure and inclusive digital economy and empower citizens. 
Nigeria has always been one of the countries with a high rate of cryptocurrency adoption in the world. The government hopes to promote the development of encryption technology while maintaining financial stability and create more opportunities for the country's economy. 
(Cointelegraph)

data.title: Nigeria Seeks Balance Between Cryptocurrency Innovation And Regulation
data.description: According to Odaily, Nigeria's Information Minister Mohammed Idris has stated that the government is striving to balance cryptocurrency innovation with enhanced regulation. This effort aims to build a more secure and inclusive digital economy that empowers citizens. Nigeria is recognized as one of the countries with a high adoption rate of cryptocurrencies globally. The government is keen on maintaining financial stability while fostering the growth of crypto technologies to create more opportunities for the national economy.

data.title: BTC/USDT,ETH/USDT and SOL/USDT Lead Binance USD-M Perpetual Futures Market in Trading Volume Over the Past 24 Hours
data.description: According to Binance Futures data, over the past 24 hours, the BTC/USDT, ETH/USDT, SOL/USDT, XRP/USDT, and DOGE/USDT trading pairs led the USD-M perpetual futures market in trading volume. BTC/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 1.8, funding rate: 0.0040%.ETH/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 3.6 , funding rate: 0.0029%.SOL/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 3.71, funding rate: -0.0014%.XRP/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 2.8, funding rate: 0.0003%.DOGE/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 3.22, funding rate: 0.0080%.

data.title: A 50x leveraged whale on Hyperliquid withdrew about 5.01 million USDC from Arbitrum 4 minutes ago, and the liquidation price of its ETH long orders dropped to $1,805
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Hypurrscan data shows that a 50x leveraged whale on Hyperliquid withdrew 5,012,528 USDC from Arbitrum as margin 4 minutes ago, and its ETH long order liquidation price has now dropped to US$1,805.

data.title: Wintermute seeks approximately $75 million in public credit for Wildcat V2 platform
data.description: Crypto market maker Wintermute created the Wildcat V2 market, seeking approximately $75 million in public credit, supporting USDC/USDT (12% annual interest rate), WETH (4%) and cbBTC (3.75%).

data.title: U.S. Congressman Tom Emmer calls for prioritizing stablecoin legislation and opposes CBDC
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News U.S. Congressman Tom Emmer said at a hearing of the House Financial Services Committee that legislation supporting stablecoins should be prioritized, while criticizing central bank digital currencies (CBDCs) for threatening American values. He reiterated his support for the Anti-Surveillance State CBDC Act, which aims to prevent future executive branches from launching CBDCs without congressional approval. Emmer warned that allowing unelected officials to issue CBDCs could subvert the American way of life. In addition, Paxos CEO Charles Cascarilla urged lawmakers at the hearing to develop unified stablecoin regulatory rules to avoid regulatory arbitrage. He suggested that the United States coordinate with global regulators to ensure global uniformity in stablecoin issuance rules, thereby promoting healthy competition in the industry.

data.title: Hyperliquid’s 50x leveraged whale continues to increase its ETH position, with a liquidation price of $1,877
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Hypurrscan data shows that the 50x leveraged whale on Hyperliquid continues to increase its ETH long positions, and now holds 140,527 ETH (approximately US$270 million), with a cost of US$5.4 million, an average opening price of US$1,900, a liquidation price of US$1,877, and a floating profit of approximately US$2.99 ​​million.
